rationale: Acting on Review 2 would only change a one-liner proof (the have+rw+⟨1,by simp⟩) to use IsNilpotent.zero or simp [IsUnipotent] (real but available via the already-imported Nilpotent.Defs); both resulting proofs are equally valid with no difference in robustness, reusability, or maintainability for this trivial one-off. Review 1's approve is sound and matches the diff exactly.
